ruins_page.title: Ruins' Rhapsody
ruins_page.subtitle: A third-person Action-Adventure framework focusing on traversal, exploration, and C++ systems.

about.title: The Quest for the Lost Heart
desc: Step into the boots of Alessandra Morioka, a daring archaeologist on a mission to uncover the Lost Heart of Arachne.
Originally developed as an academy thesis and later refined into a technical demo, this project showcases a custom third-person framework.
Inspired by classics like Tomb Raider, the project focuses on bridging character mechanics with reliable backend systems in C++.

gameplay.title: Immersive Gameplay Features
items: • Advanced Traversal: A multi-modal movement system including climbing, ledge navigation, and dynamic sliding.
• Environmental Interaction: Complex puzzle-solving using key-door mechanics and inventory-based triggers.
• Tactical Combat: Encounter diverse AI threats (animals, robots, humans) with modular weapon systems and ammunition management.
• Exploration: Three distinct atmospheric zones: Ancient Temple, a Lake with an Underground Cave, and Open Ruins.

tech.title: Core Architecture (C++)
items: • Component-Based Logic: Custom C++ components for Climbing, Swimming (with breath resistance), and Inventory management.
• Level Streaming: Implementation of a persistent world with sub-level streaming to eliminate loading screens and optimize memory.
• Save/Load System: A robust C++ serialization pipeline that tracks sub-level states, player position, and inventory persistence.
• AI Perception: Enemies utilize custom Sensing Components and Behavior Trees for realistic detection and combat states.
• Custom Collision: Specialized ECC Trace Channels for high-precision shooting, climbing detection, and fluid interactions.

systems.title: Optimization & UX
items: • Save/Load Pipeline: A robust serialization system tracking sub-level states, player progression, and inventory persistence.
• Localisation: Built-in translation framework with runtime toggle between English and Italian.
• Interactive UI: 3D Main Menu widgets integrated into the game environment with layered ambient audio design.
• Performance: Extensive profiling and asset optimization to maintain a stable and optimized experience on Windows.

codemap.title: Initial System Architecture
codemap.desc: Foundational software map designed during the thesis phase, illustrating core logic and class interactions.
codemap.img1: Architecture Map: High-level overview of the class hierarchy and communication protocols between systems.

components.title: Modular Character Logic
components.desc: Custom C++ components extending the MetaHuman base for a reusable traversal framework.
components.img1: Component Stack: View of the custom C++ modules (Climbing, Swimming, Inventory) attached to the main character.

input.title: Enhanced Input System
input.desc: Scalable control scheme using UE5 Data Assets to manage traversal, combat, and UI actions.
input.img1: Input Configuration: Mapping of movement and interaction states using the Enhanced Input plugin.

ai.title: AI & Parameter Tuning
ai.desc: Configuration for enemy sensing, procedural loot systems, and visual feedback.
ai.img1: AI Configuration: Details of the sensing components and combat parameters for robotic enemies.

bt.title: AI Behavior Trees
bt.desc: Logic flow featuring 3 main states: Autonomous Patrol, Player Chasing, and Ranged Combat.
bt.img1: Behavior Tree: Visual logic flow managing enemy decision-making and state transitions.

world.title: World Composition & Streaming
world.desc: Implementation of Level Streaming to optimize performance and area transitions.
world.img1: Level Management: Asynchronous loading setup to maintain high performance without gameplay interruptions.

cta.title: Ready to explore?
cta.subtitle: Download the demo (~1.5 GB) and experience the technical framework in action.
